positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial fox silhouette, characterized by flowing, ethereal tails and pointed ears, set against a minimalist cosmic background of deep indigo, luminous turquoise, and soft gold nebula dust. The fox is shown in a graceful, leaping pose, creating a strong central focal point. Style should be highly detailed, modern vector illustration meets bioluminescence, emphasizing clean lines, bold solid colors, and strong contrast against the background. Composition must be centered and vertically balanced for seamless apparel printing. Clean edges, flat shading techniques with subtle gradients for depth, perfect for screen printing or DTG transfer. High contrast, mystical, dreamlike atmosphere. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, artifact, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, messy, grayscale, solid color background only, realistic photo, sketch, oil painting
